creative_brief.tone: friendly, approachable, and modern with a focus on simplicity and authenticity
creative_brief.visual_style: Clean and minimalistic design with an emphasis on real-life application and diverse model representation. Use of naturalistic imagery and close-ups to showcase the product's texture and finish.
creative_brief.conceptual_technique: Digital-first approach leveraging social media platforms with user-generated content, influencer partnerships, and tutorial-based storytelling
creative_brief.typography_style: Simple, rounded sans-serif font (similar to Glossier's signature style), understated to let the product stand out
creative_brief.color_scheme: soft pinks, muted reds, and fresh coral shades reflecting the blush colors against a clean white backdrop
